title: Strings with ASCII charset and UCS2 don't match in join statement in MySQL 8
bug_features_seed: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE __ttmp_unicode (wstrName VARCHAR(256) COLLATE "ucs2_general_ci" DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE __ttmp_ascii (strName VARCHAR(64) COLLATE "ascii_general_ci" DEFAULT NULL);
SELECT wstrName, strName FROM __ttmp_unicode INNER JOIN __ttmp_ascii ON __ttmp_unicode.wstrName = __ttmp_ascii.strName;
key_bug_features: Join statement fails with ASCII and UCS2 charset mismatch
